items.text: This is a whiteboard hand scene. It gives the project a ready-made card surface: one deck lane for action cards and one pinned advisor lane.

items.text: In a larger mod, this can become the place where monthly actions, party work, advisors, circles, or other repeatable systems live.

items.text: This bundled project is a safe place to learn how a Dendry mod is built. The next scene acts like a tiny in-game event: it has a title, a body, two choices, result text, and effects that change simple variables.

items.text: In Studio, open Explore or Design after loading this template. Select **A Small Campaign Office** to see how the source-backed text maps to the player-facing event. Select **Open the workspace hand** to see the minimal hand/deck/advisor skeleton used by card-style DendryNexus projects.

items.text: This sidebar belongs to the bundled demo template. It gives a whiteboard version of the common SDAAH-style dashboard: simple resources, support, card progress, advisor trust, and room for more status sections.

packages.label: Monthly popup router package
packages.reason: Popup content can be opened through linked events, but the protected post-event router boundary must be reviewed separately.
packages.recommendedNextAction: Edit linked event content where guarded; keep router changes as explicit review evidence.
